title: H^2SD: Hybrid Hindsight Self-Distillation
innovation_summary: H^2SD: Hybrid Hindsight Self-Distillation: To address this tradeoff, we introduce H^{2}SD, a hybrid hindsight self distillation framework that uses the teacher differently according to trajectory correctness.
